name: Benz Mining Corp.
description: Benz Mining Corp. is a pure-play gold exploration company dual-listed on the TSXV and Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: BNZ), focused on its flagship 100%-owned Glenburgh Gold Project in Western Australia. Glenburgh hosts a historical resource of 16.3 million tonnes at 1.0 g/t gold (510,100 oz) and covers 50 km of prospective strike in a new frontier gold district. The company is at the advanced explorer stage, with a mining lease in place and a major drill program of over 250,000 metres planned for 2026.
